keyEvents.text: Marwan Attia (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Timothy Castagne (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Belgium 0, Egypt 1. Emam Ashour (Egypt) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mohamed Salah.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Ahmed Fatouh (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Belgium 0, Egypt 1.
Substitution, Belgium. Nicolas Raskin replaces Timothy Castagne.
Substitution, Belgium. Maxim De Cuyper replaces Amadou Onana.
Substitution, Belgium. Romelu Lukaku replaces Charles De Ketelaere.
Own Goal by Mohamed Hany, Egypt. Belgium 1, Egypt 1.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Egypt. Ramy Rabia replaces Emam Ashour.
Maxim De Cuyper (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Egypt. Zizo replaces Mostafa Zico.
Substitution, Egypt. Hamza Abdelkarim replaces Mohamed Salah.
Substitution, Belgium. Matias Fernandez-Pardo replaces Jérémy Doku.
Substitution, Belgium. Hans Vanaken replaces Kevin De Bruyne.
Substitution, Egypt. Karim Hafez replaces Ahmed Fatouh.
Substitution, Egypt. Ibrahim Adel replaces Hamdi Fathy.
Second Half ends, Belgium 1, Egypt 1.
